name: Hobby Collection | Full-Stack Gallery
detail: A full-stack gallery built with React and Go to catalog Gunpla and figures. It integrates PostgreSQL, JWT auth, and Cloudinary for secure management and high-performance media hosting.

name: Ama3 Bot | AI Discord Integration
detail: A Go-based Discord bot featuring intent classification and context-aware AI conversations. It uses a dual-model fallback and concurrency to ensure high reliability and responsive, multi-user interactions.
